nasb.text: Then Moses called Bezalel and Oholiab and every skillful person in whom the Lord had put skill, everyone whose heart stirred him, to come to the work to perform it.

esv.text: And Moses called Bezalel and Oholiab and every craftsman in whose mind the Lord had put skill, everyone whose heart stirred him up to come to do the work.

cnv.text: 於是，摩西把比撒列和亞何利亞伯，以及心裡有智慧的，就是蒙耶和華賜他們心裡有智慧的人，凡是心裡受感要前來作這工的人，都召了來。

ccb.text: 于是，摩西召来比撒列、亚何利亚伯和所有蒙耶和华赐智慧、有技能、愿意参与建造的人。
